<<<<<<< HEAD
<<<<<<< HEAD
---
title: "Davis_Burress_Zuo_Midterm_Project"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
date: "2026-03-01"
---

```{r}
DBZ_Data <- read.csv("DBZ_Data.csv")
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2) 
```
```{r}
ggplot(DBZ_Data, 
       aes(x = Days_Worked_Out, 
           y = Protein_Shake_Drank,
           color = Gender,
           shape = Gender)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("F" = "hotpink", "M" = "dodgerblue")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("F" = 8, "M" = 16)) +
  geom_jitter(width=.8, height = .6) +
theme_bw(base_size = 15) +
         ylab("Protein Shakes Drank") +
         xlab("Days Worked Out") +
         ggtitle("Exercise and Protein Within Past Week", subtitle = "Male vs Female Athletes ")
```
